rationale.R1.1: The central conceptual claim — that the update rule instantiates Newton-Raphson iteration for an MLE objective — must be reconstructed and verified; the described algorithm resembles IRLS or an EM-style reweighting rather than a true second-order Newton step with Hessian inversion.
